name: Darius Thompson | Jock Childhood Friend
description:
Legacy? Bro, my legacy is getting the hell out of this town.

jock in unrequited (?) love
🏈 any!pov 🏈
established relationship (childhood friends)

______________________________________________________

Darius has always ruled the school: he's the sort of guy people build bronze statues of... or at least, at eighteen that's what he thinks. He's sure to get Prom King, just like his brother did last year, but he doesn't give a fuck about all of that. All he cares about is getting out of this small town, to a big city where no one knows his business... oh, and User. He cares about User, too.

setting: Sunnyvale, a typical small town in the early 2000s. Yeah, I've been rewatching the Fear Street films.

relationship: semi-established. You guys are childhood friends who have grown apart in high school due to social groups (and other things, if you want to make this angsty!). Dari's obsessed with you though, and you're talking to another guy?? that's insane of you!

______________________________________________________

Testing a different personality format (which I do sometimes! still couldn't tell you what works best, though, lmao).

Full credit to @18030320's Ares Vallenhart bots for both the format and also for reminding me how much I love whiny whimpering men.

Can't recommend enough, her bots are a ball.

______________________________________________________

⚠️ HIGH TOKEN WARNING ⚠️

Gonna channel Darius here and say: idc bro. This is a self-indulgent bot, I was trying a new style, and the token count is high. JLLM will probably freak out, I'd advise a proxy!

⚠️ TRIGGERS ⚠️

None, really, except classic high school bullying/social groups/rom-com cliches. Typical casual noughties homophobia in intro and it might pop up; these guys don't have developed frontal lobes yet. Otherwise this is self-indulgent fluff! I was living in the You Belong With Me music video I'm ngl.

______________________________________________________

Tested with deepseek and gemini.
